content.full_text:
April 15, 1991

Margery Hinterman  
American Savings Bank  
P.O. Box 19689  
Irvine, California 92713-9689

Re: Your Request for Confirmation of Telephone Advice  
Our File No. A-91-195.

Dear Ms. Hinterman:

You have requested confirmation of telephone advice provided to you concerning the campaign provisions of the Political Reform Act. (Government Code Sections 81000-91015.)

Your letter correctly summarizes my advice that the remaining funds held by American Savings Bank Employee PAC (FPPC #891082) may be transferred to American Savings Bank PAC (FPPC #891056). To terminate PAC #891082, complete a Form 415, Statement of Termination, and attach a Form 420, Recipient Committee Campaign Statement - Long Form, disclosing the transfer as an expenditure on Schedule E. However, PAC #891056 must report receipt of the funds as a monetary contribution on Schedule A, rather than as a miscellaneous increase to cash on Schedule G.

A copy of your letter is enclosed for your convenience.

Please do not hesitate to contact me at (916) 322-5662 if you have additional questions.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin  
Acting General Counsel

By: Lynda Cassady  
Political Reform Consultant

Enclosure
